field.name: l10n_th_income_tax_type
field.invisible: country_code != 'TH' or not is_withholding_tax_on_payment or type_tax_use != 'purchase'

field.name: l10n_th_income_tax_type_others
field.invisible: country_code != 'TH' or not is_withholding_tax_on_payment or type_tax_use != 'purchase' or l10n_th_income_tax_type != 'others'

field.name: l10n_th_income_tax_type
field.invisible: not is_withholding_tax_on_payment or type_tax_use != 'purchase' or country_code != 'TH'

field.name: l10n_th_income_tax_type_others
field.invisible: not is_withholding_tax_on_payment or type_tax_use != 'purchase' or country_code != 'TH' or l10n_th_income_tax_type != 'others'
